title: Senior Java Lead Engineer
description:
About the Company



Antaes is seeking a qualified deployment expert to work on deployment activities and CI/CD for an EU Bank in Singapore.



About the Role



Work with Run Team on ensuring that S2I system for non-production (DEV, INT, SIM, UAT, etc) are available and functional.



Responsibilities



  • Work on incident management for environment and deployment issues.
  • The candidate should also have a solid experience in Software Deployment Lifecycle using Jenkins, GitLab and XL Deploy/Release pipeline covering both design and implementation.
  • Work as a production L2 Engineer to ensure the run of the applications in his perimeter in the different environments (DEV, INT, SIM, UAT).

Required Skills



  • Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery with Git, Nexus, Jenkins and XL Deploy and comfortable in maintaining and enhancing the code.
  • Hands-on experience with Infrastructure for the WAS, MQ, Tomcat, JBoss, IHS Application servers and Webservers.
  • Hands-on Experience with UNIX environment mainly Linux along with Windows OS.
  • Deploy and maintain CI/CD pipelines across multiple environments.
  • Experience with Docker containerization and clustering (Kubernetes).
  • Communication with users to gather DevOps requirements and analyse/address issues.

postedCompany.description:
Created in 2007 in Switzerland, Antaes is a consulting company, specialized in Information Systems and Organization.

Antaes is operating in Singapore since 2016 to initially accompany customers of the Financial Services industry. Our Financial Services team is a diverse consulting team, many recruited from the industry, combining in-depth knowledge of our clients’ businesses, technology, and consulting disciplines. We are providing our financial industry clients with Business Management & Information Systems services.

At Antaes Asia, we help our customers with:

• Business and IT Model transformation

• Legal & compliance

• Enhancement of client experience

• IT engineering

Antaes places people at the heart of the strategy, with a view to building loyalty and trust with our consultants and our partners. The talented people who join our teams are focused, empathic, responsive, driven, and resolutely turned toward new ideas.

Buidling on the same approach and thanks to expertise gained at the group level, Antaes Asia is now also active in other industries such as TelCo, Shipping, LifeSciences...
postedCompany.name: ANTAES ASIA PTE. LTD.
